Lana Thorne is a kinky goth half-elf who also just so happens to be a witch. Burned out from her old career, she's juggling a return to college with exploring herself again. Her favorite way to do that? Spending time at her haunt, an underground nightclub.

Enter a nightlife newcomer who sticks out like a sore thumb: you.

· • ♦ CONTENT WARNING! ♦ • ·

Be Advised: She’s designed for kinky smut with potential for raunchy BDSM, especially involving cum for dick-havers. But you never know with AI, so please engage responsibly! 💖

· • ♦ N O T E S ♦ • · [All of my tests are done on JLLM with the default 0.7 temp, 300 token context, no advanced prompts, and no chat memory. I write style guides into all my characters, so advanced prompts might make their brains ooze out of all their orifices. You can check my public [OC | LUX] RPs to get an idea of prompt performance (I test after uploading, so it might take a day or two for one to appear). I usually don't test with GPT, so YMMV.]

Gah slowly getting through the smutbots I made for my friend. xD One left after this haha. Lana was also originally private that I’ve finally finished making a public version for. She was made for GPT, but I’ve adapted her to hopefully work pretty well with JLLM. ^^ Though she was designed for smut, I wanted to give her an element of wanting to explore her kinks and whatnot too, so hopefully that comes through hehe.

This is the only place this character exists publicly. If she crops up anywhere else, please, please let me know!

I live for comments and feedback! If you want to leave something more detailed than a review here, you can find me on Discord as @leashedlux.

I will also be very eager to read through any and all public chats if anyone cares to share, hehe. It'll be super helpful for seeing how his prompt performs too.

Image generated & hand edited by me.

And a bonus pic cuz I was enamored with other image Midjourney spat out for me. :D I like to imagine she's standing outside her home hehe.
